# iNNv0 — Full Content

> AI Agent Skills ecosystem for OpenCode. Generator: https://actionn.cognnitive.com/nn-design-presets

## Home

iNNv0 is a modular skills ecosystem that powers your AI agent with specialized capabilities: model evaluation, skills management, document transformation, and web design.

Site: https://actionn.cognnitive.com
Source: https://github.com/innV0/actioNN

### Skills

**Model Router** — Evaluates whether the AI model you're using is the right fit for each task. Classifies requests across 4 scales (Trivial, Bug Fix, Feature, Refactor) and recommends the optimal model based on cost and capability.

**Skills Manager** — Meta-skill that manages all skills in the repository. Scans, detects installation types (Junction, Symlink, Copy), and manages each skill's lifecycle.

**traNNsform** — Complete document ingestion and transformation pipeline. Converts PDFs, DOCX, and more to unified Markdown using the agent's own LLM as the transformation engine.

**Web Design Guide** — Complete design system with Morado Nazareno (#4D0E4E) palette, systematic typography (Plus Jakarta Sans, Playfair Display, Geist Mono), and 8px grid. Includes guides for commercial layouts and technical documentation with Docsify.

### Architecture

Skills are loaded on demand by the OpenCode agent. At session start, the Skills Manager detects all available skills and checks their installation status. When a task matches a skill, the agent loads its instructions and executes the specialized workflow. Each skill is self-contained with its own domain rules.

### Installation

```
git clone https://github.com/innV0/actioNN.git
cd actioNN
opencode .
```

The Skills Manager configures everything automatically using Windows NTFS junctions for live-change reflection.

## Documentation — Model Router

Evaluates whether the AI model is suitable for each task. Four task scales: Trivial/Atomic (Flash), Bug Fix (Flash or MiMo), Feature (MiMo), Refactor/Architecture (MiniMax M3). On-query only — does not auto-load every session.

## Documentation — Skills Manager

Meta-skill that manages skill lifecycle. Activation Contract: scans skills, presents table, interacts with user. Mandatory start-of-session load.

## Documentation — traNNsform

Document ingestion and transformation pipeline. Converts PDFs, DOCX, and more to unified Markdown using LLM as transformation engine.

## Documentation — Web Design Guide

Comprehensive light-mode design system. Strict spacing grid (8px base), typography stack (Plus Jakarta Sans, Playfair Display, Geist Mono), and Morado Nazareno (#4D0E4E) brand palette. Covers Docsify theming, marketing CTAs, AI image style prompting, AI-training optimization, and attribution metadata.

### Design Tokens

- Canvas Base: #FFFFFF
- Canvas Inert: #FAFAFC
- Brand Primary: #4D0E4E (Morado Nazareno)
- Border Soft: #F2F2F7
- Ink Primary: #111112
- Ink Muted: #636366

### Spacing

8px base grid. Scale: 4px (xs), 8px (sm), 16px (md), 24px (lg), 48px (xl), 64-96px (xxl). Max container: 1280px.

### Typography

H1: 48px/1.15/800/-0.03em. H2: 32px/1.25/700/-0.02em. H3: 22px/1.35/600/-0.01em. Body: 16px/1.6/400. Caption: 13px/1.4/500/+0.01em.

Playfair Display italic for accent words. Geist Mono/JetBrains Mono for code (14px).

### Attribution

All pages generated with this skill include `<meta name="generator" content="https://actionn.cognnitive.com/nn-design-presets">`.
